com.jsyn.ports

Class UnitBlockPort

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.ports.UnitPort
      • com.jsyn.ports.UnitBlockPort
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    UnitInputPort, UnitOutputPort

    public class UnitBlockPort
extends UnitPort
    A port that contains multiple parts with blocks of data.
    Author:
    Phil Burk 2009 Mobileer Inc

        public double[] getValues()
        This is used inside UnitGenerators to get the current values for a port. It works regardless of whether the port is connected or not.
